business.headline: Sensex jumps 800 points, Nifty nears 24,000 amid reports of US-Iran peace dealSensex jumps 800 points, Nifty nears 24,000 amid reports of US-Iran peace deal

Sensex, Nifty today: Will stock market fall on petrol, diesel price hike?GIFT Nifty futures were trading at 23,915 around 8:42 am, indicating that the benchmark Nifty50 could open above Friday's closing level of 23,719.30.

Petrol prices hiked by nearly Rs 7.5/litre in two weeks: Check ratesThe repeated hikes in petrol and diesel prices come as India faces mounting pressure from elevated global crude oil prices linked to the ongoing West Asia conflict and disruptions around the Strait of Hormuz, one of the world's most important oil shipping routes.

Petrol, diesel prices hiked for 4th time in less than 2 weeksAnalysts have cautioned that continued hikes in petrol and diesel rates could raise transportation and logistics expenses, eventually leading to an increase in the prices of essential commodities and food products.

India's affordable housing dream hits a luxury roadblockIndia's housing market is tilting towards luxury projects even as affordable demand remains strong. Experts say rising costs, weak funding and policy gaps are pushing home ownership further from the middle class.

Would you wait 5 years for gratuity or switch for better pay? Indians speakSometimes, the toughest career decisions come with perfect timing or terrible timing, depending on how you see it! Imagine being months away from gratuity when a recruiter calls with an offer too good to ignore. Stay loyal a little longer or leave for better pay? I spoke to Indian professionals, and the answers may surprise you.

Insurers cash in on unlimited health insurance, leave fine print to customersHandcrafted ByOur Editors In the second part of The Unlimited Illusion, we examine what insurers really mean by "unlimited" health cover and why customers often discover the limits only later.

Fuel prices up Rs 5 in 10 days, govt defends limited hike amid West Asia crisisPetrol and diesel prices were raised for the third time this month as the Centre said a 76-day freeze had cushioned consumers despite soaring crude.

Petrol, diesel, CNG prices hiked again. Check rates in your cityIndia relies on imports for nearly 85 per cent of its crude oil requirements, making domestic fuel prices vulnerable to fluctuations in global markets. The fresh hike is likely to put additional pressure on commuters, transporters and businesses across multiple sectors.

India better positioned on inflation, RBI should keep rates unchanged: ASSOCHAMASSOCHAM's analysis showed that India's retail inflation increased only slightly from 3.2% in February 2026 to 3.5% in April 2026 — a rise of just 0.3 percentage points. In comparison, inflation in the United States jumped sharply from 2.4% to 3.8% during the same period.

RBI to transfer record Rs 2.87 lakh crore dividend to govt for FY26This move is expected to give the government additional financial room at a time of geopolitical uncertainty and global economic challenges.

Don't file your ITR blindly: These 6 AIS mismatches can invite an income tax noticeThink filing your ITR is just about checking pre-filled details and clicking 'submit'? Not so fast. As the ITR filing season for FY 2026–27 begins, tax experts say ignoring even a small mismatch in your AIS could land you in trouble later.

Haryana is a home away from home for Japanese firms: CM Nayab Singh SainiSpeaking at the third India-Japan Conclave in New Delhi, organised by India Today, Saini said Haryana has become a "home away from home" for Japanese companies and stressed that the relationship between the two sides is built not only on investment, but also on trust.

8th Pay Commission: Why a full return to old pension scheme may be difficult nowAs the 8th Pay Commission widens consultations, employee unions are renewing their push for the Old Pension Scheme. But with Rs 16.5 lakh crore already inside NPS, the debate is shifting towards guaranteed pension safeguards within the existing system.
Sensex, Nifty end week higher as banking shares drive gainsThe BSE Sensex ended 231.99 points, or 0.31%, higher at 75,415.35. The Nifty 50 gained 64.60 points, or 0.27%, to close at 23,719.30.

Why your next pack of condoms may cost more amid global oil shockThe company, which sells Manforce condoms and holds around 30% market share in the country, said it may eventually pass on higher costs to customers if the situation in the Middle East worsens.

Japan bets big on India with $68 billion investment target, tech pushAt the third India-Japan Conclave organised by the India Today Group, Japan unveiled an updated Indo-Pacific strategy that places India at the heart of its push on technology, investment and regional security.
Sensex up 500 points: Why is stock market rising today?At 1:45 PM, the BSE Sensex was up 514.96 points, or 0.68%, at 75,698.32. The index touched an intraday high of 75,810.97 and a low of 75,230.75.

Is India sleepwalking into a retirement crisis?Many Indians dream of a peaceful retirement, but dreams alone do not pay medical bills or monthly expenses. So, are Indians financially ready for retirement, or just hoping for the best?

From long queues to quick clicks: How innovation is reshaping digital lendingApplying for a loan is no longer just about filling forms and waiting for approvals. From instant verification to quicker disbursals, innovation is reshaping digital lending, but what does this shift really mean for borrowers?

entertainment.headline: Bhumi Pednekar horrified by viral video of men groping women's poster in viral video Actor Bhumi Pednekar condemned a viral video showing men allegedly making obscene gestures at a woman's wall painting near a swimming pool. She appealed for stricter laws, while talking about women's safety.

Lord Nataraja is suffering: Internet roasts Ananya's dance clip in Chand Mera Dil A dance sequence from Ananya Panday's Chand Mera Dil has triggered strong reactions online. Several X users criticised the video and called it a poor interpretation of Bharatanatyam.

Drishyam 3 box office Day 4: Film records solid Sunday, earns Rs 141 crore globally Actor Mohanlal's Drishyam 3 posted a slight jump on its first Sunday, earning Rs 13.95 crore nett in India. Strong Keralam footfalls and steady overseas support pushed the film's worldwide total to Rs 141.34 crore.

Jr NTR's Dragon glimpse in focus: New Prashanth Neel or Prashanth repeat? The first glimpse of Jr NTR's Dragon, released on May 19, has triggered a sharp debate over Prashanth Neel's familiar visual language. Neel says the film is driven by different emotions and aimed at a patriotic elements.

Hans Zimmer effect? AR Rahman says his name will make non-Indians watch Ramayana Composer AR Rahman said Hans Zimmer's presence in Ramayana will draw viewers outside India to the film. His remarks place the music collaboration at the centre of the project's global pitch.

Aishwarya Rai serves couture fantasy in ivory roses at Cannes 2026, pics go viral Aishwarya Rai served up yet another dramatic couture look at Cannes in a sculpted ivory gown with roses at Cannes. She can be seen posing on a balcony in pics that are going viral on social media.

Main Vaapas Aaunga gets glowing review from Ektaa Kapoor, Sharvari-Vedang react Producer Ektaa Kapoor shared the first review of filmmaker Imtiaz Ali's Main Vaapas Aaunga ahead of its June release. The film's lead actors, Sharvari and Vedang Raina, reacted to her post with thank-you messages.

Fan collapses in heat outside Jalsa during Big B's weekly Sunday meet. Watch A middle-aged fan fainted outside Amitabh Bachchan's Jalsa residence after waiting for hours in the heat during the actor's Sunday greeting. A few days earlier, Bachchan had said fans deserve respect and asked his security team to treat well-wishers properly.

Kangana Ranaut backs Aishwarya's Cannes look: Get used to older women on red carpets Kangana Ranaut defended Aishwarya Rai Bachchan after online criticism of her Cannes looks. Her remarks highlighted personal expression, ageism and the scrutiny around women on red carpets.

Ravi Kishan predicts National Award for Ram Charan's Peddi, compares it to Dangal At Peddi's Bhopal song launch, Ravi Kishan praised Ram Charan and compared the film to Aamir Khan's 3 Idiots and Dangal. He said the sports drama would offer hope for India's youth and could fetch a National Award for Ram Charan.

Trisha reacts to fan calling her common factor in Vijay, Ajith and Suriya's top hits Trisha Krishnan reacted to a fan calling her the common factor in Vijay, Ajith Kumar and Suriya's biggest hits. The social media post referred to Leo, Good Bad Ugly and Karuppu.

Vijay's Jana Nayagan new release date out after 5-month wait? Delayed from its initial January window due to CBFC certification clearance delays, Vijay's final film Jana Nayagan remains in limbo. Here's a look at the film's future release date.
Sunil Pal on Samay Raina's India's Got Latent 2: Seat your own mother, father Comedian Sunil Pal mocked India's Got Latent Season 2 and suggested that Samay Raina's parents should judge the show.

Akshay Kumar to lead alien thriller Samuk, Hollywood stunt experts join Akshay Kumar has signed Samuk, an alien thriller directed by Kanishk Varma and produced by Vipul Shah. The film brings in international talent while centring practical effects over full CGI.

Aishwarya looks every bit the Cannes empress in feathered couture Aishwarya Rai stepped out for Cannes interviews in a custom Fjolla Nila gown and continued her string of festival appearances. Take a look at the pictures here.

Ek aur gaana utha liya: Salman leaves Varun red-faced with Chunari Chunari joke Salman Khan jokingly remarked that Varun Dhawan had "picked up" another one of his songs, referring to Chunari Chunari being recreated for the upcoming film Hai Jawaani Toh Ishq Hona Hai.

No.1 man always: KJo's emotional note after David Dhawan hints at final film Karan Johar posted an emotional note after David Dhawan said his next film, Hai Jawaani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, may be his last as director. He wrote how David Dhawan is an inspiration for an entire generation of filmmakers.

Karuppu box office Day 9: Suriya's film races towards Rs 250 crore globally Karuppu staged a sharp box-office recovery on its second Saturday, earning Rs 12.20 crore nett in India. The jump pushed the Suriya-starrer's worldwide total to Rs 217.74 crore, with Tamil Nadu leading the collections.

Drishyam 3 box office Day 3: Mohanlal's thriller smashes Rs 100 crore globally Mohanlal's Drishyam 3 has crossed Rs 100 crore worldwide within three days of its release. Strong occupancy rates, led by the Malayalam version, have sustained its weekend run.

general news.headline: Petrol, diesel prices hiked for 4th time in less than 2 weeksAnalysts have cautioned that continued hikes in petrol and diesel rates could raise transportation and logistics expenses, eventually leading to an increase in the prices of essential commodities and food products.

Democracy won, intimidation lost: PM on BJP's landslide victory in Falta repollA constituency once seen as a fortress of the Trinamool Congress delivered a stunning political reversal in West Bengal, with the BJP securing a landslide victory and the TMC's candidate slipping to fourth place.

How Jahangir Pushpa Khan, TMC's Diamond Harbour model came apartFrom promising an electric crematorium for the BJP's last rites to watching his own empire collapse, Abhishek Banerjee's Diamond Harbour fortress has fallen. In Falta, the BJP has won a commanding victory in the repoll following the surrender of Trinamool Congress's strongman and self-proclaimed Pushpa, Jahangir Khan.

India can count on me, big fan of PM Modi: Trump joins Delhi event via callSpeaking virtually at the US Embassy's 250th Independence Day celebration in New Delhi, Donald Trump praised India and PM Narendra Modi.

Why BJP picked Haryana CM Saini to spearhead Mission PunjabFrom wearing a saffron turban at every Punjab event to attacking the AAP on governance and law and order, Haryana CM Nayab Singh Saini has become the BJP's most visible face in Punjab. Saini is at the forefront as the BJP attempts to build a non-Jat social coalition for the 2027 Assembly polls in its biggest Punjab push in decades.

Watch: Marco Rubio's stunning pre-birthday bash in Delhi. Courtesy Village PeopleUS Secretary of State Marco Rubio was surprised with an early birthday celebration by Village People at Bharat Mandapam in New Delhi. The moment unfolded during the US independence anniversary event, which also featured a performance by AR Rahman.

Petrol prices hiked by nearly Rs 7.5/litre in two weeks: Check ratesThe repeated hikes in petrol and diesel prices come as India faces mounting pressure from elevated global crude oil prices linked to the ongoing West Asia conflict and disruptions around the Strait of Hormuz, one of the world's most important oil shipping routes.

6 Bengaluru cops suspended after explosives found near PM Modi's convoy routeSix policemen were suspended after two gelatin sticks were found during security checks ahead of Prime Minister Narendra Modi's Bengaluru visit. The discovery has triggered an inquiry, while BJP leader BY Vijayendra called it a serious security lapse.

Nita Ambani bursts into laughter after student's witty Mumbai Indians dig in speechA student of Dhirubhai Ambani International School sprinkled his graduation speech with a Mumbai Indians joke, drawing laughter from Nita Ambani and the audience.

Until clarity on relocation, no disruption of services: Delhi Gymkhana to CentreDelhi Gymkhana Club has asked the Centre not to disrupt its functioning after being ordered to vacate its Safdarjung Road premises by June 5. The club has sought clarity on relocation, alternative land allotment, and the impact on members, employees and operations.

Punjab Kings, are you proud of the season you had?Punjab Kings were knocked out of the IPL playoffs race after Rajasthan Royals snuck into the fourth spot in the league table. Punjab endured a difficult season on and off the field.

Power tussle, late decisions: Is Congress high command losing grip in Karnataka?The Congress leadership is expected to discuss Karnataka's unresolved power balance with Siddaramaiah in Delhi. The meeting comes as uncertainty over leadership, Cabinet decisions and electoral strategy continues to weigh on the party.

Lord Nataraja is suffering: Internet roasts Ananya's dance clip in Chand Mera DilA dance sequence from Ananya Panday's Chand Mera Dil has triggered strong reactions online. Several X users criticised the video and called it a poor interpretation of Bharatanatyam.

Woman carries mother-in-law, 90, on back for 9 km to draw her pension from bankThe video has triggered strong reactions online, with many users questioning why elderly and bedridden pensioners in remote regions are still required to travel long distances for verification despite repeated government claims of doorstep services and Digital India initiatives.

TMC's Jahangir Pushpa Khan opted out of Falta repoll. So how did he get votes?Jahangir Khan, the TMC candidate who once compared himself to 'Pushpa' and later withdrew from the Falta Assembly repoll, still got 7,783 votes as BJP's Debangshu Panda secured a landslide win in the constituency.

Novak Djokovic survives early scare, dances his way into second roundFrench Open 2026: Novak Djokovic recovered from a set down to beat Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard in four sets at Roland Garros. The win eased shoulder concerns and set up another meeting with a French opponent.

Aishwarya Rai serves couture fantasy in ivory roses at Cannes 2026, pics go viralAishwarya Rai served up yet another dramatic couture look at Cannes in a sculpted ivory gown with roses at Cannes. She can be seen posing on a balcony in pics that are going viral on social media.

Rs 1.5 lakh in 23 days: ITI pass-out says no to job, earns through organic farmingAkhilesh Maurya, an ITI-trained graduate from Mau, turned to organic cucumber farming after returning home. His reported earnings and low cultivation costs have brought focus to crop diversification and village-based livelihoods.

X stops creators from making money off stolen viral videosX is taking action against accounts reposting stolen viral content to earn money through its creator revenue-share program. The change targets revenue-sharing abuse while still allowing commentary through attribution tools.

Trump stuns Gulf leaders on call, floats Abraham Accords expansionDonald Trump is pushing for a new political order in West Asia. Once the Iran war ends, he wants Arab countries to join the Abraham Accords.

Why elderly in India are suddenly obsessed with Tai Chi walkingWhat's new in the fitness world? Tai Chi walking is currently grabbing the attention of the elderly, especially. Experts weigh in on how beneficial it really is and whether the weight-loss claims hold any truth.

Missing 12-year-old girl found dead in J&K, body found 200 metres from homeA 12-year-old girl who went missing in Budgam was found dead in a field near her home, with police suspecting rape and murder. The case has triggered outrage across Kashmir, with top leaders demanding a thorough probe and strict punishment.

Employee steals Rs 8.7 crore from Ahmedabad bank, buys properties; arrestedThe alleged theft came to light after the officials of the bank's Kalupur branch found that 174 bundles of Rs 500 notes, totalling Rs 8.70 crore, had gone missing from the vault that was handled by chief custodian Sanjay Sharma and joint custodian Harsiddh Kadiyar.

Weak rupee is pushing Indian students in US, UK into hunger, burnout, and poor gradesA falling rupee is forcing Indian students abroad to cut meals, chase about-to-expire discounted food, and take up extra jobs. Their families are facing higher costs to sustain them in the UK or the US, even as the education loans keep ballooning.

sports.headline: Day 2 schedule: Iga Swiatek, Elena Rybakina aim strong start Day 2 of the French Open 2026 brings a packed slate of opening-round action with top stars beginning their campaigns across all three show courts. Iga Swiątek and Elena Rybakina headline the action on Centre Court as they launch their title bids in Paris.

Criticised, trolled, not fully fit: Riyan still dares to chase Warne's RR legacy IPL 2026: Heavily criticised for both his on-field and off-field decisions, Riyan Parag battled injury to lead Rajasthan Royals into the playoffs. Now, he has the chance to match Shane Warne's legacy by becoming the first RR captain since 2008 to lift the IPL trophy and deliver Rajasthan's second title in franchise history.

Punjab Kings, are you proud of the season you had? Punjab Kings were knocked out of the IPL playoffs race after Rajasthan Royals snuck into the fourth spot in the league table. Punjab endured a difficult season on and off the field.

Lionel Messi picks up injury, leaves Argentina and fans worried for World Cup Lionel Messi left Inter Miami's match against Philadelphia Union after appearing to hurt his hamstring. The scare overshadowed Miami's 6-4 win and left Argentina fans concerned.

Novak Djokovic survives early scare, dances his way into second round French Open 2026: Novak Djokovic recovered from a set down to beat Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard in four sets at Roland Garros. The win eased shoulder concerns and set up another meeting with a French opponent.

IPL Play Of The Day: RR unleash Jofra Archer masterplan to punch playoff ticket Rajasthan Royals sent Jofra Archer up the order and he blew Mumbai Indians off the script with a 15-ball 32 before sealing the win with the ball. The gamble showed RR's tactical nerve at a playoff crossroads and allowed Archer to repay the faith the franchise put in him.

Who is Nishesh Basavareddy? 21-year-old Indian-origin man ousts Fritz at French Open French Open: Nishesh Basavareddy, a 21-year-old wildcard of Indian origin, announced himself on one of tennis' biggest stages after stunning seventh seed Taylor Fritz in the opening round of the Roland Garros on Sunday.

Kieron Pollard raises questions on Hardik Pandya's MI captaincy Mumbai Indians' batting coach Kieron Pollard admitted that Hardik Pandya's stint as captain has not gone the way either the player or the management would have wanted. Pollard also hinted at internal discussions over the team's future after Mumbai Indians finished ninth in the standings.

Emotional Pep Guardiola breaks down in tears in Manchester City farewell Pep Guardiola could not hold back his emotions as Manchester City players formed a guard of honour for Bernardo Silva during an emotional farewell at the Etihad Stadium on Sunday.

Premier League: Tottenham survive as West Ham suffer relegation on final day Tottenham Hotspur narrowly avoided relegation from the Premier League on a dramatic final day of the season, surviving with a tense 1-0 win over Everton while West Ham United were condemned to the Championship despite beating Leeds United 3-0 on Sunday.

Punjab's toxic social media game backfires after Rajasthan reach IPL playoffs Punjab Kings were brutally roasted by Rajasthan Royals on social media after they beat Punjab to seal the final playoffs spot on Sunday, May 24. Punjab have been caught in several off-field controversies this season.

Bruno Fernandes breaks Premier League's assist record to cap stellar seasonBruno Fernandes supplied his 21st assist of the Premier League season as Patrick Dorgu headed Manchester United ahead at Brighton. This completed a stellar season for Fernandes and United.

National record falls twice as Kuldeep and Dev Meena light up men's pole vaultKuldeep Kumar and Dev Meena lit up the Federation Cup 2026 in Ranchi with a gripping pole vault contest on Sunday, as the duo broke the men's National Record twice before finishing as joint record holders.

IPL 2026 playoffs: RCB vs GT in Qualifier 1, SRH vs RR in EliminatorThe playoffs for IPL 2026 have been set after Rajasthan Royals defeated Mumbai Indians by 30 runs in the first match of Sunday's double-header at the Wankhede Stadium. Royal Challengers Bengaluru will now face Gujarat Titans in Qualifier 1, while Rajasthan Royals will take on Sunrisers Hyderabad in the Eliminator.

MI vs RR: Archer storm pushes Rajasthan into playoffs, dumps PBKS and KKR outJofra Archer starred with 32 off 15 and 3 for 17 as Rajasthan Royals beat Mumbai Indians and reached the playoffs. The win for the Royals mean that KKR and PBKS have been knocked out of the tournament.

Suryakumar Yadav slams wrist injury rumours: People don't understand cricketIndia's T20 captain Suryakumar Yadav has firmly dismissed rumours surrounding an alleged wrist injury, saying those questioning his fitness "don't understand cricket" and insisting his shot-making itself is proof that he is fully fit.

KKR vs DC highlights: Kuldeep Yadav rattles Kolkata, KKR finish 7th in IPL tableKKR vs DC highlights, IPL 2026: Kuldeep Yadav marked his return in a stunning three-wicket haul to complement KL Rahul's blazing half-century at the top as Delhi Capitals outclassed an out-of-sorts Kolkata Knight Riders by 40 runs, in an inconsequential final league match of the IPL on Sunday.

MI vs RR: Jadeja makes Shardul pay for costly no-ball with banter, boundariesShardul Thakur thought he had Ravindra Jadeja, only for a no-ball to drag him back. Jadeja answered with banter, two boundaries and laughter on both sides.

Warner says SRH still have him blocked on social media: Never getting unblockedDavid Warner said Sunrisers Hyderabad still appears to have him blocked on Instagram. The exchange reopened an old rupture between player and team, despite one of the IPL's most successful partnerships.

Marta Kostyuk fights tears, trauma, missile strike scare to reach second roundFrench Open: Marta Kostyuk battled through an emotional morning to defeat Oksana Selekhmeteva 6-2, 6-3 and reach the second round. Kostyuk said she had spent part of the morning crying after a missile strike destroyed a building near her parents' home in Ukraine.

MI vs RR: No Bumrah vs Sooryavanshi 2.0 as Mumbai rest star pacer for final gameMumbai Indians rested Jasprit Bumrah for their final IPL 2026 league game against Rajasthan Royals. The call denied Wankhede a renewed duel with Vaibhav Sooryavanshi as RR chase a win to qualify for the playoffs.

Day 1 Highlights: Basavareddy stuns Taylor Fritz, Djokovic into 2nd roundFrench Open, Day 1 Highlights: Indian origin Nishesh Basavareddy has stunned seventh seed Taylor Fritz. Playing his first main draw of the French Open, the Indian origin player stuns the 7th seed in a 4-set encounter. Meanwhile, Novak Dokovic needed four sets to beat lower-ranked Giovanni in his opening round.

China teen stuns athletics world with second-best women's javelin throw in historyChina's 18-year-old Yan Ziyi uncorked a 71.74m throw on her first attempt at the Xiamen Diamond League. The effort made the teenager second on the all-time list and brought the world record into view.

Be true to yourself: Guardiola warns Man City against hiring a copy-paste successorPep Guardiola has told Manchester City not to appoint a manager who tries to replicate him. As he prepares to leave after the Aston Villa match, he said his successor must be unique and backed the club amid the financial charges.

Sanju Samson vs Rohan Bopanna: India stars meet in wild role reversal clashSanju Samson and Rohan Bopanna entertained fans in a hilarious crossover challenge where cricket met tennis, with both stars stepping into each other's worlds in a fun video.

George Russell pips teammate Kimi Antonelli to take pole for Montreal sprintGeorge Russell took pole for the Canadian Grand Prix sprint as Mercedes locked out the front row with Kimi Antonelli. The result answered a difficult Miami weekend and hinted that Mercedes' upgrade has sharpened its pace.

Pakistan captain downplays hype around Women's T20 World Cup clash vs IndiaFatima Sana said Pakistan will not focus solely on their high-profile clash against Harmanpreet Kaur's India at the ICC Women's T20 World Cup, stressing that every match in the tournament is equally important.

Inside Yogasana, India's bold bid to take yoga to the OlympicsFor years, the perception around yoga was that it was more of a lifestyle and wellness choice. But with a Commonwealth Games push coming up, Yogasana is ready to take one of India's oldest fitness routines to the global stage and possibly, even to the Olympics.

Naomi Osaka credits Gael Monfils for inspiring Black tennis talent globallyNaomi Osaka praised Gael Monfils for inspiring generations of Black tennis players, saying his success had a huge impact on the sport globally. Ahead of his farewell French Open campaign, Monfils said he was proud to have shown young Black athletes that they too could succeed in tennis.

Rishabh Pant captaincy under threat as LSG consider reset after IPL 2026Tom Moody suggested that LSG will look to evaluate all their options which includes the leadership positions. This comes after the side led by Rishabh Pant lost to Punjab Kings to finish at the bottom of the points table.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
